lever: Replace per-output-element O(rank) flat-index decode with fill-off + sparse scatter-on; O(total) + O(indices) instead of O(total*rank); dense F64/I64/Bool output via new_*_values.
isomorphism: bit-identical; output position is off unless its class-axis coord equals the input index in [0,nc); scatter writes exactly those on-positions at out_base+idx*class_stride.
tests: one_hot_fill_scatter_matches_reference + 7 one_hot tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean
